tools.Name: Scientific Agent Skills
tools.Description: A collection of 135 ready-to-use scientific skills for AI agents, covering genomics, drug discovery, and data analysis.
tools.Use_Case: Automating complex multi-step scientific workflows like virtual screening or omics analysis in Cursor, Claude, or Codex.

tools.Name: CLI-Anything
tools.Description: A plugin framework that enables AI agents to control virtually any professional software through a generated CLI harness.
tools.Use_Case: Turning GUI applications like Blender, GIMP, or LibreOffice into agent-native tools for automated content generation.

tools.Name: DeepEval
tools.Description: An open-source unit-testing framework designed specifically for evaluating LLM-based applications.
tools.Use_Case: Measuring performance metrics like answer relevancy, hallucination, and bias in RAG pipelines and chatbots during development.
